progressNote.label: Progress Note
progressNote.description: Chinese, English, or mixed — AI converts it into a professional Progress Note.
progressNote.placeholder: e.g. Patient is alert today, blood pressure stable, continuing on ventilator...

medicationAdvice.label: Medication Advice
medicationAdvice.description: Mixed Chinese-English or rough English is fine — AI only fixes grammar without adding or removing content.
medicationAdvice.placeholder: e.g. pt renal fx poor, sug D/C morphine d/t resp depress risk, change to fentanyl patch...

nursingRecord.label: Nursing Record
nursingRecord.description: Use templates for quick entry; AI helps catch typos and formatting.
nursingRecord.placeholder: Write a nursing record or apply a template...

draftSection.title: Your Draft
draftSection.polishHint: AI will use this patient's medication list and lab summary as context; please review the polished result before copying.
draftSection.polishingNotice: AI is processing this draft; edits made now will not affect the current run.

polishedSection.title: AI Polished
polishedSection.promptDescPolished: Edit if needed, then click "Copy polished result to HIS"
polishedSection.promptDescBlank: Click the "{{label}}" button on the left to generate
polishedSection.copyDraftHisTitle: Not yet polished — will copy raw draft. Consider running AI Polish first.
polishedSection.copySuccessPolished: Polished result copied; ready to paste into HIS
polishedSection.copySuccessDraft: Unpolished draft copied; review carefully after pasting into HIS

refine.title: Refine again
refine.placeholder: How would you like to adjust? e.g. shorter / drop dosage details / use bullet points
refine.fallbackError: Refine failed. Please try again later.

templates.applyConfirmDescription: Your current draft exceeds {{threshold}} characters. Please choose:
templates.saveError: Failed to save template. Please try again later.
templates.saveDuplicateName: "{{name}}" duplicates a built-in template name. Please choose another.
templates.deleteNoPermission: You do not have permission to delete this template
templates.deleteError: Failed to delete template. Please try again later.
templates.updateError: Failed to update template. Please try again later.

draftStorage.quotaWarning: Storage is full; current drafts may not survive a reload.

polish.fallbackError: AI Polish failed. Please try again later.
